Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Assignment.Enums.AssignmentSubmissionType

Defines the submission type for an assignment.

Possible enumeration values:

NameValueDescription
Individual

0

Each student submits their own answer
CourseGroups

1

Each course group submits one answer
StudentDefinedGroups

2

Students can define their own groups and submit one answer per group
